name: proshop2
description: Ecommerce application built with the MERN stack

scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.report:auth: npm run test:coverage:auth && npm run docs:update-coverage:auth
scripts.test:coverage:product: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest backend/test/productController.test.js backend/test/productValidition.test.js backend/test/productwrite.test.js --forceExit --detectOpenHandles --coverage --coverageReporters=json-summary --collectCoverageFrom="backend/controllers/productController.js" --collectCoverageFrom="backend/middleware/checkObjectId.js"
scripts.report:product: npm run test:coverage:product && npm run docs:update-coverage:product
scripts.report:userprofile: npm run test:coverage:userprofile && npm run docs:update-coverage:userprofile
scripts.test:coverage:order: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest backend/test/order.test.js backend/test/orderPayment.test.js backend/test/utils.test.js --forceExit --detectOpenHandles --coverage --coverageReporters=json-summary --collectCoverageFrom="backend/controllers/orderController.js" --collectCoverageFrom="backend/utils/calcPrices.js"
scripts.report:order: npm run test:coverage:order && npm run docs:update-coverage:order
scripts.report:admin: npm run test:coverage:admin && npm run docs:update-coverage:admin
scripts.report:all: npm run report:auth && npm run report:product && npm run report:userprofile && npm run report:order && npm run report:admin

author: Brad Traversy
